title: Figure 3 in Detection of the amoeba Entamoeba gingivalis in periodontal pockets
author: Bonner, Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. Entamoeba gingivalis is not detected by primers specific for other species of the Entamoeba genus. Agarose gel-resolved products from nested PCR using 1 ng E. moshkovskii, 1 ng E. histolytica and 125 ng E. gingivalis patient #0 DNA. Amplification was not obtained in control without matrix (not presented) and E. gingivalis.
steps_raw: Figure 3. Entamoeba gingivalis is not detected by primers specific for other species of the Entamoeba genus. Agarose gel-resolved products from nested PCR using 1 ng E. moshkovskii, 1 ng E. histolytica and 125 ng E. gingivalis patient #0 DNA. Amplification was not obtained in control without matrix (not presented) and E. gingivalis.
